reviews.comment:
Que seria de mi sin el ACA?? Acompaña a mi familia de chica. Esta en cualquier rincon de la Argentina y me ha rescatado de los lugares mas reconditos.  El personal super capacitado. Ya es la tercera generacion en mi familia que es socio.

(Translated by Google)
What would I be without ACA? It's been with my family since I was a child. It's been in every corner of Argentina and has rescued me from the most remote places. The staff is super-trained. This is the third generation of my family to be a member.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzeE1TZW1RRRAB

reviews.comment:
Voy al café de la estación de servicio
Es como todos los de YPF pero a mi me gusta tienen muy buena atención
En cuanto a la carga de combustibles siempre hay mucha cola perdes entre 30 minutos a 1 hora para cargar

(Translated by Google)
I go to the gas station café.
It's like all the YPF cafés, but I like it; they have very good service. As for filling up, there's always a long line; you lose between 30 minutes and an hour waiting to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/422157531741884596/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzX19EUUlnEAE
